Eligibility edge-case advisory

Eligibility edge-case advisories matter when they explain which reservation pools lose rollover eligibility under unusual failover, replay, or regional saturation conditions.

The advisory should define the signals, exception thresholds, and dashboard checks that reveal when a pool drops out of the normal eligibility path.

It should also clarify how these edge cases interact with reservation guarantees, queue protection, and recovery playbooks after the constrained window ends.
